name: Moonpig Group PLC
description: Online greeting cards, gifts and experiences platform. 70% UK online card market share, 12m active customers. Asset-light, negative working capital, 28% EBITDA margin. IPO'd Feb 2021.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £350m in FY2025 (+2.6%). Moonpig brand +8.6%. 12m active customers, 2.94 orders/customer. Plus subscriptions 920k members. UK online card market only 6% penetrated by volume. International expansion (Ireland, Australia, US).
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted EBITDA margin 27.6%. Gross margin 59.6%. Asset-light, negative working capital. Moonpig segment margin 31.2%. Capex ~3.8% of revenue.
assumptions.risks: Greetz declining. Experiences segment challenged (£57m goodwill impairment FY2025). Net debt £96m (1.0x leverage). FY2021 revenue was COVID-boosted (£368m). Reported EPS loss in FY2025.
assumptions.catalyst: Mid-teens adjusted EPS growth target. £60m buyback planned FY2026. Inaugural 3.0p dividend. AI personalisation. International expansion. Only 6% UK volume penetration.
